title: pow: DESIGN.md §PoW invariants
description:
Document PoW invariants in DESIGN.md as a stable API section.

What: New §PoW enrollment gate section in DESIGN.md.

Content to add:
- Token format table (31 bytes, field by field)
- Hash input construction (111 bytes, field by field)
- Verification invariants:
  * min_diff = 20 bits (never lower without security review)
  * max_diff = 30 bits (impossible challenges rejected)
  * staleness window = ±600s (replay TTL must match)
  * replay TTL = 600s (must match staleness window)
  * server_salt never persisted, never logged
  * PoW verification precedes signature verification
  * PoW verification precedes subscription check
- Wire protocol: ChallengeParams adds server_salt + difficulty; AuthenticateParams adds pow_token
- Error codes: POW_REQUIRED=-32030, POW_INVALID=-32031, POW_STALE=-32032, POW_REPLAYED=-32033 (stable; never change)
- Security note: token is bound to ed25519 public key via hash input — cannot be reused for a different key
acceptance_criteria: DESIGN.md contains §PoW enrollment gate with all invariants listed; cargo test still passes
close_reason: DESIGN.md §Anti-Spam PoW Enrollment updated: token format table, hash input, all invariants, error codes table
